mapper.sql: CASE WHEN total_latency_ms IS NOT NULL THEN GREATEST(total_latency_ms, 0) WHEN start_time IS NOT NULL AND end_time IS NOT NULL THEN GREATEST(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MICROSECOND, start_time, end_time) / 1000, 0) ELSE NULL END
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(COUNT(1), 0) AS total, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = '00' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS success, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = '01' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS failed, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = '02' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS partial, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = '03' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS dead_letter, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG()), 0) AS avg_latency_ms FROM rule_bridge_execution_trace
SELECT MIN(start_time) AS min_time, MAX(start_time) AS max_time FROM rule_bridge_execution_trace
